t_ch: 这里是……？
t_en: Where's this...?

t_ch: 画中世界的某处，被称为「幻月秘庭」的地点。
t_en: A place in the World in Canvas, called the "Phantasmoon Courtyard."

t_ch: 这株古树，真美。
t_en: This ancient tree is breathtaking.

t_ch: 这株古木千年不朽，只在游戏开始前盛放。
t_en: This ancient tree has stood for a thousand years, blooming only on the eve of the games.

t_ch: 依照古籍记载，此地是「幻月游戏」的仪式中枢。
t_en: According to ancient texts, this is the heart of the "Phantasmoon Games" ceremony.

t_ch: 八张面具，八位谒者。不久之后，当人们佩戴上古老的面具，神坛也将显现它们的形貌——然后，游戏便将开启。
t_en: Eight masks. Eight Supplicants. When people don the ancient masks in the near future, the altar will also reveal the masks' forms. Then, the games shall begin.

t_ch: 我听闻：姬子小姐，您身上流淌着绘世的血脉……
t_en: I've been told, Miss Himeko, that Graphia's blood courses through your veins...

t_ch: 眼下，「巡猎」的使者也一同在场。这场竞逐「欢愉」的仪式，便是银河形势的缩影。
t_en: The messenger of the Hunt is here as well at this moment. This Ceremony to compete for the Elation is but a reflection of cosmic politics.

t_ch: 既然如此，不妨就用「幻月游戏」的结果，来定夺列车成为「风帆」还是「旗帜」？
t_en: In that case, why not use the result of the Phantasmoon Games to decide whether the Express will become a "sail" or a "banner"?

t_ch: 我们会考虑你的提议。
t_en: We'll consider your proposal.

t_ch: 不过，参加游戏需要「欢愉假面」，想必公司已经有所准备了？
t_en: However, to take part in the games, one must have a "Mask of Elation." I assume the IPC has prepared for that.

t_ch: 截至目前，为我所有的面具共：3张。如果时间再充裕些，还可以掌握更多。
t_en: As of now, the number of masks I possess is: three. With more time, I could obtain even more.

t_ch: 在历史上，从未有人想过，或是做到将谒者与面具统一调配。
t_en: In all of history, no one has conceived of a unified command of all Supplicants and masks, let alone accomplished that feat.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但这次，公司将凭借资源和影响力，尝试「调控」这场游戏。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But this time, the IPC intends to "regulate" the games with our resources and influence.</color>

t_ch: 天外来客加入「幻月游戏」倒也不稀奇，但公司…竟然想掌控整个游戏？
t_en: It is not unusual for visitors from beyond the sky to join the Phantasmoon Games, but the IPC... actually seeks to control the entire thing?

t_ch: 「欢愉」星神向来以变化无常著称，真珠小姐，请务必小心。这是善意的提醒。
t_en: The Aeon of Elation is famed for unpredictability. Miss Pearl, you must take care. This is a word of caution.

t_ch: 正因阿哈变化无常，如此「欢愉」的尝试才有成功的可能。
t_en: It is precisely because Aha is so mercurial that such an "elated" attempt has a chance to succeed.

t_ch: 打扰您会谈了，真珠女士。
t_en: Pardon the interruption, Madam Pearl.

t_ch: 您派出的导游发来消息，说是假面愚者闹事，袭击了他和列车的客人，几个人走散了。
t_en: The guide you dispatched has sent word. The Masked Fools have stirred up trouble, attacking him and the Express guests. They were separated in the chaos.

t_ch: 不意外。那些愚者一直对公司虎视眈眈。
t_en: That is not surprising. Those Masked Fools have long kept the IPC in their sights.

t_ch: 看来，无论列车如何选择，「幻月游戏」已经开始了。
t_en: It seems the Phantasmoon Games have begun, regardless of the Express's choice.

t_ch: 我来联系那两个孩子吧。
t_en: I'll get in touch with those two kids.

t_ch: 三人随即返回会客室。
t_en: The three of them returned to the reception room.

t_ch: 真珠小姐，出于安全考虑，我和瓦尔特得先告退了。
t_en: Miss Pearl, Welt and I must take our leave now for the sake of security.

t_ch: 两位这就要离开？我原本还有个计划：想和姬子小姐谈谈古弁才天国的艺术史——
t_en: Are you both leaving already? I had another plan in mind: to speak with Miss Himeko about the art history of ancient Benzaitengoku...

t_ch: 尤其是您先祖的遗作《覆世沧浪图》，还有她神乎其技的幻造技艺。
t_en: Especially your ancestor's final work Worldbreaker Waves and her unparalleled mastery of imagenesis art.

t_ch: 既然真珠小姐有这样的雅兴…姬子，我先出发？
t_en: Since Miss Pearl is in such high spirits... Himeko, shall I depart first?

t_ch: 拜托你了，瓦尔特。
t_en: I'm counting on you, Welt.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生，在离开前，请带上这份礼物吧。
t_en: Mr. Yang, please accept this gift before you leave.

t_ch: 不，你客气了。列车并不缺行动资金，我不能收下这笔钱。
t_en: No, you are too kind. The Express has no shortage of operational funds. I cannot accept this money.

t_ch: 你误会了！向无名客赠送俗物，未免也太过失礼。请先打开这个箱子看看。
t_en: You misunderstand. To offer the Nameless something so mundane would be far too discourteous. Please, open this case first and see for yourself.

t_ch: 喔？这是……！
t_en: Oh? This is...!

t_ch: 这是…珠星财团推出的超可动模型「魔动机铠」，是还没面世的新品。
t_en: This is... the movable Magico Mechatron model from Pearluxe Corp. It's not even been released to the market yet.

t_ch: 我知道：瓦尔特先生对机器人技术颇有见地，特地选了这份礼物，希望你喜欢。
t_en: I am aware: Mr. Yang has an expert understanding of robotics. I chose this gift especially for you, and I hope it pleases you.

t_ch: 这的确是一份厚礼，感谢您的馈赠。
t_en: This truly is a most generous gift. Thank you for such an offering.

t_ch: 该去办正事了，告辞。
t_en: Time to get down to business. I'll be taking my leave.

t_ch: 「绘世学院」…是什么地方？
t_en: "Graphia Academy"... What kind of place is that?

t_ch: 那是个培养绘师的学校，在这个世界还挺有名的。
t_en: It is a school that trains artists, and it's quite well-known in this world.

t_ch: 我们得去那儿等人。朽叶小姐知道该怎么走吗？
t_en: We need to wait for someone there. Do you know the way, Miss Kuchiba?

t_ch: 我来为两位带路吧，也好顺路确保你们的安全。
t_en: Allow me to guide you both and ensure your safety along the way.

t_ch: 这里就是绘世学院了。两位就在这儿等候伙伴吧。
t_en: This is Graphia Academy. You can wait for your companions here.

t_ch: 对了，为免再有意外，我也把你们的消息告知了那位导游先生。
t_en: Oh, and to prevent further surprises, I have already informed your guide of your situation.

t_ch: 这是我的联系方式，在「幻月游戏」开启期间，两位若是遇到什么问题也可以随时找我。
t_en: Here is my contact info. If you encounter any problems during the Phantasmoon Games, you may reach me at any time.

t_ch: 多谢朽叶小姐！给您添麻烦了！
t_en: Thank you so much, Miss Kuchiba! Sorry for the trouble!

t_ch: 到地方了，咱们先和杨叔打个招呼吧，看看他到了哪儿？
t_en: We are here. Let's check in with Mr. Yang first and see where he is.

t_ch: 杨叔还没答复吗？
t_en: Mr. Yang still hasn't replied?

t_ch: 这地方信号不太好。
t_en: The signal is a bit weak here.

t_ch: 收不到消息呢…
t_en: I can't receive any messages...

t_ch: 要不要找个信号接收好的地方？咱们进学校里看看？
t_en: Shall we find a place with better reception? How about heading inside the school to take a look?

t_ch: 你只是想逛逛吧？
t_en: You just want to wander around in there, don't you?

t_ch: 没有的事。我心说这不是姬子姐的母校吗？
t_en: No way. I was just thinking... isn't this big sis Himeko's alma mater?

t_ch: 我看这学校大厅…和动画里看到的简直一模一样！
t_en: This school lobby... It looks exactly like what I've seen in animations!

t_ch: 可惜了，咱们俩都没正经上过学。要是能在这地方体验一下校园青春生活……
t_en: Too bad neither of us ever went to a real school. If only we could taste a bit of campus life here...

t_ch: 喂，{NICKNAME}，要不要一起装作学生进去瞧瞧啊？
t_en: Hey {NICKNAME}, how about we sneak in and pretend to be students?

t_ch: 我是折大博士毕业。
t_en: I got my PhD from Paperfold University.

t_ch: 拉倒吧你！咱们在折纸大学才上几天学？你哪儿买的文凭？
t_en: Oh, please! We only spent a few days at Paperfold University. Where did you even buy that diploma?

t_ch: 会被人赶出来吧？
t_en: We're going to get kicked out, you know!

t_ch: 没事的。咱们俩这一身，走在学生堆里多合适啊。
t_en: Relax. With the way we look, we fit right in among the students.

t_ch: 看来这街你是没逛够。
t_en: Seems like you still haven't had your fill of wandering around.

t_ch: 哎呀，反正眼下杨叔一时半会联系不上，要不咱们一边逛着一边到处看看有没有他的影子，也许他早到了呢。
t_en: Well, since we can't contact Mr. Yang yet, why don't we stroll around and keep an eye out for him? Maybe he's already here somewhere.

t_ch: 听说火花花晚些时候打算官宣一个重磅新闻！
t_en: I heard Sparxicle is planning to make a huge announcement later!

t_ch: 真的吗？是和「幻月游戏」有关的事情吗？
t_en: Really? Is it about the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 这我就不知道了。但毫无疑问，如果是她打算加入游戏，一定会赢喔！
t_en: I have no idea. But if she decides to take part in the games, she's definitely gonna win!

t_ch: 火花大人天下第一可爱，谁还能竞争得过这样的美少女啊！
t_en: Lady Sparxie is the cutest girl in the world. Who could possibly stand a chance against someone as cute as her!?

t_ch: 说的是呐！
t_en: That's so true!

t_ch: 喂喂，瞧见了吗？刚刚有个高大的褐发眼镜男走过。那谁啊？
t_en: Hey, did you see that? A tall guy with brown hair and glasses just walked by. Who's he?

t_ch: 听说是新来的老师。
t_en: I heard he's a new teacher.

t_ch: 好帅气喔。虽然看起来有点年纪了，但正是那种成熟的感觉才令人怦然心动啊。
t_en: He is so handsome~ Sure, he looks a bit older, but that mature charm is exactly what makes my heart race.

t_ch: 哈哈别傻了，你该不会想要向老师递情书吧？
t_en: Haha, don't be silly. You are not planning to hand the teacher a love letter, are you?

t_ch: 听说斯科特同学又和老师起冲突咯……
t_en: I heard Skott got into another clash with a teacher...

t_ch: 那个三年级的黄毛混混吗？哈，倒也不意外。所以，这次他又顶撞了哪个老师？
t_en: That blond-haired delinquent from third year? Hah, no surprise there. Which teacher did he annoy this time?

t_ch: 不清楚，看结果应该会被退学吧？他早该退学了，仗着自己的爸爸是公司的人，成天耀武扬威。
t_en: No idea, but it looks like he is about to be expelled. He should have been kicked out long ago, if you ask me. He struts around as if he owns the place just because his dad works for the IPC.

t_ch: 快点开除这样的人渣吧！
t_en: Just expel that scumbag already!

t_ch: 快了快了，听说眼下正在校长室门口罚站呢。
t_en: Soon enough. Word is he is standing outside the dean's office right now as punishment.

t_ch: 咱们溜达的地方还是别离开校门口太远吧？万一杨叔到了呢？
t_en: Let's not wander too far from the school gate. What if Mr. Yang shows up?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，快过来快过来！快看这朵海浪！好壮观啊！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, come here! Quick! Look at this wave! It's so spectacular!

t_ch: 它不会突然落下来，浇我们一个透心凉吧？
t_en: It won't suddenly come crashing down and drench us, will it?

t_ch: 等等，这也是画出来的吗？一旁还标注了作者？绘世…是谁？
t_en: Wait, this is painted too? The painter's name is even stated next to it. Graphia... Who's that?

t_ch: 幻造景画上，一行小字标注了作画的来由：引鸽川之水抹消错笔，不意呈浪花之形，遂挥毫作此景画，以诠物形之妙。
t_en: On the imagenated painting, a small inscription explained its origin: With water drawn from Dovebrook, I effaced a mistaken stroke, yet unexpectedly, a flurry of waves emerged. Thus inspired, I seized my brush to capture this scene, as an ode to the exquisite forms of nature.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，见、见鬼了！斯科特为什么在这儿？！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Wh—What the heck! Why's Skott here!?

t_ch: 你们是几年级的学生？看到学长不鞠躬，真是没大没小！
t_en: What year are you two in? Seeing your senior and not even bowing? How rude!

t_ch: 等等，你们俩…为什么看起来这么眼熟啊？总觉得好像有人让我来这儿找你们……
t_en: Wait. You... why do you two look so familiar? It feels like someone sent me here to find you...

t_ch: 这一开口，绝对是真的斯科特。{NICKNAME}，咱们这是穿越到哪儿去了？
t_en: Now I know it's definitely the real Skott. {NICKNAME}, where did we get teleported to?

t_ch: 校园青春剧？
t_en: A high school drama?

t_ch: 我不想跟这样的家伙上同一所学校！
t_en: I don't wanna go to the same school with someone like that!

t_ch: 校园机器人动画？
t_en: A school robot animation?

t_ch: 是那种培养十四岁少男少女驾驶大机器人迎击巨大不明外星生物的动画吗？咱们应该早就过了那个年纪了吧！
t_en: An animation where fourteen-year-olds are trained to pilot giant robots and fight mysterious alien creatures? We're way past that age, aren't we!?

t_ch: 是噩梦，快快醒来！
t_en: This is obviously a nightmare. Wake up!

t_ch: 好痛！掐你自己脸蛋就好，不要掐我的啊！这是真的，这不是梦！
t_en: Ouch! Pinch your own cheeks, not mine! This is real! Not a dream!

t_ch: 是谁在门口吵闹啊？
t_en: Who's making such a racket at the door?

t_ch: 杨叔！你来了！
t_en: Mr. Yang! You're here!

t_ch: 两位同学，你们在门口做什么？
t_en: Students, what are you doing in front of the door?

t_ch: 是斯科特那家伙…！斯科特人呢？
t_en: That was Skott...! Where did he go?

t_ch: 等等，你刚才为什么叫咱们俩「同学」？
t_en: Wait, why did you just call us "students"?

t_ch: 我刚办完你们的转学手续，正在等校长确认，有什么事先进屋来说吧。
t_en: I just finished your transfer procedures and am waiting for the dean's confirmation. Whatever it is, let's discuss it inside.

t_ch: 这转学手续到底是怎么回事？
t_en: What's this transfer business all about?

t_ch: 当然是从今天开始，两位同学将正式转入这座学校，开始新的校园生活呀。
t_en: Well, starting from today, you two are officially transferring to this academy to begin your brand-new school life.

t_ch: 火花？！
t_en: Sparxie!?
Sparxie!?!?

t_ch: 哟吼~两位同学，我们又见面了！
t_en: Yo-ho~ My good classmates, we meet again!

t_ch: 你怎么在这儿？！
t_en: What are you doing here!?

t_ch: 对于无所不知的电子妖精火花花，还有什么网络消息是捕捉不到的呢？
t_en: What news on the net could possibly escape the all-knowing digital fairy Sparxicle?

t_ch: 校长，你来了。
t_en: Ah, you're here, Dean.

t_ch: 你？是校长？！
t_en: You? You're the dean!?

t_ch: 当然啦，从刚才开始，我已经正式接管这座学校，成为它的代理校长了！
t_en: Of course. As of this moment, I have taken over this school and become its acting dean!

t_ch: 毕竟这座学校里满是看过我直播的粉丝，一点小小的「认知修正」就足以让很多人按我的要求行动。
t_en: After all, this school is filled with fans who watch my streams. A little "cognitive adjustment" is all it takes to make plenty of them do whatever I want.

t_ch: 咦，你们怎么还是一副剑拔弩张的样子，该不会想殴打「校长」吧？
t_en: Huh? Why the hostile stares? Surely you're not thinking of roughing up the "dean"?

t_ch: 好了好了，放松心情！暂时<size=36><color=#dbc291ff>忘掉「幻月游戏」</color></size>如何？
t_en: Alright, alright, relax! How about <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>forgetting the Phantasmoon Games</color></size> for now?

t_ch: <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>尽情享受这轻松、惬意、浪漫又热血的青春校园生活！</color></size>
t_en: <size=36><color=#dbc291ff>Instead, throw yourselves into a carefree, cozy, romantic, and enthusiastic school life!</color></size>

t_ch: 完啦！！！
t_en: Oh noooo!!!

t_ch: 两年后…
t_en: Two years later...

t_ch: …醒醒！
t_en: ...Wake up!

t_ch: 醒醒啊！老师来啦！
t_en: Wake up! The teacher's here!

t_ch: 少女如春风般的吹息，挠得你耳尖与心尖一样痒痒。
t_en: The girl's breath, gentle as a spring breeze, tickles both your ear tips and your heartstrings.

t_ch: 怎么一闭眼就是两年后了？
t_en: So I closed my eyes, and two years have already gone past?

t_ch: 别睡啦！你所剩不多的青春也要溜走咯？
t_en: Stop sleeping! Your fleeting youth is slipping away!

t_ch: 三月，小心，是火花！
t_en: March, watch out, it's Sparxie!

t_ch: 笨蛋，校长已经盯着你很久啦！
t_en: Idiot... the dean has had their eyes on you for ages!

t_ch: 眼看绘师资格考试就要开始了，我真不知道有些同学怎么还能有心思趴在桌子上睡觉？
t_en: The Artist Qualification Exam is right around the corner, and some students are still dozing off in class!

t_ch: 火花，你在搞什么鬼！
t_en: Sparxie, what the heck are you doing!

t_ch: 给我住口！校长也是你能直呼其名的？你心里还有没有一点对她的尊重？
t_en: Silence! How dare you call the dean by name? Do you have no respect for her at all?

t_ch: 站在你眼前的这位，是网络主播、创作歌手、潮流的引领者，教育界的新星，假面愚者中的假面愚者——请你尊称她一声校长，谢谢！
t_en: Before you stands an online streamer, a singer-songwriter, a trendsetter of internet culture, a rising star in education, and the Masked Fool among Masked Fools. Show some respect and address her as dean, thank you!

t_ch: 安啦安啦，斯科特同学~♥谢谢你能为老师出头~
t_en: It's fine, it's fine, Skott~♥ Thank you for standing up for the teacher~

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，意志力很顽强嘛。难怪那个{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}想让你加入幻月游戏。只可惜，你遇到了我。
t_en: Such strong willpower, {NICKNAME}. No wonder that {RUBY_B#Sparkle}outdated model{RUBY_E#} wanted you in the Phantasmoon Games. Too bad you crossed paths with me.

t_ch: 很快，你会和这些学生一样，统统变成我的小玩具~
t_en: Soon, you will be just like these students. All of you will be turned into my little toys~

t_ch: 同学们！今天是「校园卫生日」，请帮助火花校长找到「那件东西」~♥像是档案室之类的地方，都给我翻上一翻哟。
t_en: Students! Today is Campus Cleanup Day, so help dean Sparxie find "that thing"~♥ Search places like the archive room from top to bottom.

t_ch: 对了，老师们也全部要上阵劳动喔，如果有人看到了那位缺勤的老师，请一定告诉我，我会好好奖励乖孩子的！
t_en: And teachers are all required to pitch in as well. If anyone spots that truant teacher, be sure to tell me. I will reward obedient students handsomely!
Okay!

t_ch: 哼，{NICKNAME}，要不是看在火花老师的份上，我这次一定要狠狠揍你一顿。
t_en: Hmph, {NICKNAME}, if not for Miss Sparxie, I would have beaten you to a pulp right now.

t_ch: 我又怎么你了？
t_en: What did I do to you this time?

t_ch: 斯科特同学，棒球社的事情都过去两年了，你还在记恨{F#她}{M#他}吗？
t_en: Skott, it has been two years since that baseball club incident. Are you still holding a grudge against {M#him?}{F#her?}

t_ch: 说得轻巧！如果不是{NICKNAME}，老子现在已经在校运会上崭露头角了！都是这个家伙，断送了我的棒球梦！
t_en: Easy for you to say! If it weren't for {NICKNAME}, I would already have made my mark at the school sports meet! That jerk crushed my baseball dreams!

t_ch: 就这？
t_en: That's it?

t_ch: …什么叫就这？你还想对我做什么过分的事情？！
t_en: ...What do you mean "that's it"? Were you planning something even worse for me!?

t_ch: 对不起，我的宿敌。
t_en: Sorry, my nemesis.

t_ch: 道歉有用的话，要警察干嘛？我知道，你是个内心潜藏着反社会人格的恶魔。
t_en: If apologies solved everything, why would we need cops? I know what you are: a devil with a twisted, antisocial heart.

t_ch: 就在上周，我打算告白的时候，你把我的情书折成纸飞机，飞进了厕所！
t_en: Just last week, when I was about to confess my feelings, you folded my love letter into a paper airplane and sent it flying into the toilet!

t_ch: 害得想把信捞出来的我…我，被女同学误会了！
t_en: And when I tried to fish it out... the girls in class completely misunderstood me!

t_ch: 听好了，{NICKNAME}，本少爷现在正式向你发起决斗挑战！今天放学后，我会在学校天台等你，你敢不敢来？！
t_en: Listen up, {NICKNAME}! I'm here to challenge you to a duel! After school today, I will be waiting on the rooftop. Do you dare to come!?

t_ch: 一言为定，你可别逃跑。
t_en: It's a deal. Do not even think of running away.

t_ch: 你俩，现在给我滚开！老子要下课了！
t_en: You two, out of my way. I'm done with class!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，你今天怎么怪怪的？是临近毕业，压力太大了吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're acting kind of strange today. Is it because graduation's near?

t_ch: 火花怎么成校长了？
t_en: How did Sparxie become the dean?

t_ch: 她一直是我们的校长啊？
t_en: She has always been our dean, hasn't she?

t_ch: 我们…真的是这里的学生吗？
t_en: Are we... really students in this school?

t_ch: 你这问题可把我问住了…我这个年龄，你这个岁数，不是这里的学生还能是什么？
t_en: You stumped me there... At our age, what else could we be but students here?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你该不会是学业压力太大…失忆了吧？你可不能垮掉啊！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, don't tell me... Did the pressure of school make you lose your memory? You can't fall apart now!

t_ch: 也好，咱们班的合影刚洗出来，就用它来帮你回忆回忆。
t_en: Actually, we just got our class photo developed. Let's use it to jog your memory.

t_ch: 你看，这就是咱们班的合照，有没有想起些什么？
t_en: Look, this is our class photo. Does it bring anything back to you?

t_ch: 照片上这个粉毛又是谁啊？
t_en: Who's that pink-haired person in the photo?

t_ch: 那不是我吗！
t_en: That's me!!!

t_ch: 我是说另一个！那个粉毛、长耳朵的女孩！
t_en: I mean the other one! That girl with pink hair and long ears!

t_ch: 那是…谁来着？是我们班的同学吗？不会是偷偷混进来的校外闲散人员吧！
t_en: Who was that again...? Is she really someone in our class, or just some random outsider sneaking in?

t_ch: 先不管了，还是介绍一下大家都认识的……
t_en: Anyway, let me introduce the people everyone knows...

t_ch: 喏，这是刚才和你起冲突的斯科特同学，是个仗着家里有钱肆意妄为的家伙。两年前你们在棒球社，同为社团的王牌。不过……
t_en: See this guy? That's Skott, the one who argued with you earlier. He is a spoiled brat who flaunts his family's money. You were both aces in the baseball club two years ago, but...

t_ch: 他因为和你打赌失败而学狗叫，引来路边野狗追赶，最终逃跑时崴了脚没能参加校运会的事情…不知道你还有印象吗？
t_en: He lost a bet with you and had to bark like a dog. That drew the attention of some strays that chased him down, so he twisted his ankle while running and missed the school sports meet... Do you remember that?

t_ch: 狗叫？有些印象…
t_en: Bark like a dog? Yeah, kinda rings a bell...

t_ch: 是这么个故事走向吗？
t_en: Is that really how the story went?

t_ch: 喏，校长也在照片上，旁边是班主任瓦尔特老师，也是我们的历史老师。
t_en: Look, the dean is in the photo too, and so is Mr. Yang, our homeroom and history teacher.

t_ch: 杨叔…好像说他当过老师？
t_en: Mr. Yang... didn't he say he used to be a teacher?

t_ch: 有这么回事吗？
t_en: Is that true?

t_ch: 好像…是这么回事？
t_en: Yeah... I think that's right?

t_ch: 随着三月七的介绍，两年来的学生生活，正愈发清晰地浮现在你的脑海中。
t_en: As March 7th continues her introduction, your two years of student life become increasingly vivid in your mind.

t_ch: 咱们一起夜闯档案室，取回落在里面的照相机的晚上，还有…对了，还有你阻止了斯科特欺负低年级同学的英勇事迹——
t_en: Remember that night we snuck into the archive room to retrieve the camera we left behind? And... and that time you bravely stopped Skott from bullying the underclassmen...

t_ch: 我俩在这座学校里有那么多美好的回忆，你该不会都忘光光了吧？
t_en: We've shared so many wonderful memories in this school. Don't tell me you've forgotten them all?

t_ch: 好像…是有这么回事。怪不得斯科特这么讨厌我。
t_en: Yeah... I think that did happen. No wonder Skott hates me so much.

t_ch: 对吧对吧！你终于想起来了！还是斯科特同学的狗叫声最能唤起咱们俩的回忆呀。
t_en: See, I knew you'd remember! Nothing sparks our memories better than Skott's barking like a dog!

t_ch: 毕业在即，这应该是咱们在绘世学院最后的上学时光了。
t_en: With graduation just around the corner, these are likely our last days at Graphia Academy.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}同学，不知道在这座校园里，你还有什么想做却没有完成的心愿？
t_en: My classmate {NICKNAME}, is there anything left you still wish to do here on campus?

t_ch: 想再认真听一堂课。
t_en: I want to properly attend one more class.

t_ch: 这多简单，看看课程表，等下一节课开始，你可一定要认真听讲喔。
t_en: That's simple. Check the schedule, and when the next class begins, make sure you listen closely.

t_ch: 想痛快揍斯科特一顿。
t_en: I wanna beat Skott up.

t_ch: 不要了吧！快毕业前被学校开除可不是闹着玩的。
t_en: Better not! Getting expelled right before graduation is no joke.

t_ch: 想谈一段浪漫的校园恋爱。
t_en: I want to experience a sweet school romance.

t_ch: …怎么突然说起这个？
t_en: ... Why bring that up all of a sudden?

t_ch: 可惜，要是丹恒在就好了。
t_en: Too bad Dan Heng isn't here.

t_ch: 丹恒……
t_en: Dan Heng...

t_ch: 在你们俩共有的朦胧记忆里，曾有一位清冷、英俊、广受欢迎的仙舟转校生和你们共处过一个美好的学年。那一年，你们形影不离。
t_en: In your shared hazy memories, there was once a cool, handsome, and popular transfer student from the Xianzhou who spent a wonderful school year with you both. That year, you were inseparable.

t_ch: 哟吼，可惜他现在已经回仙舟「罗浮」上学啦。
t_en: Yo-ho! Too bad he's gone back to study on the Xianzhou Luofu now.

t_ch: …必须找到啵啵娃老师？
t_en: ...We have to find Ms. Dollie?

t_ch: 这位老师今天好像请假了哎？校长也一直在找她。
t_en: Huh. This teacher seems to have taken the day off. The dean has been looking for her, too.

t_ch: 哎呀，我是问，对于仅剩不多的校园青春生活，你还有什么想做的？你该不会想对老师表白吧？
t_en: Hey, I was asking what else you want to do with the little time we have left of our school life. Don't tell me you are planning to confess to Ms. Dolly?

t_ch: （对啊，找到啵啵娃老师…我是要干嘛来着？）
t_en: (Right... Found Ms. Dollie... what was I supposed to do again?)

t_ch: 总之，虽然在学校的时间有限，但眼下还有机会去做不是吗？
t_en: Anyway, even though our time at school is running out, we still have the chance to do something now, don't we?

t_ch: 许多成年人在踏上社会后才开始追悔莫及，想回到无忧无虑的学生时代。但，时间无法倒回，人生也没有重来的选择。
t_en: Many adults only start to regret once they step into society, longing to return to those carefree school days. But time does not go backwards, and life gives no second chances.

t_ch: 那句话怎么说的来着？春宵苦短、良辰易逝嘛！所以，把握住瞬息的欢愉，不要让它们溜走！咱们一起度过这最后的青春时刻吧！
t_en: How does the saying go? Youth is fleeting, and time waits for no one! So, let's seize the fleeting moments of elation before they slip away! Let's spend these last days of youth together!

t_ch: 一阵风适时吹过，撩动女孩粉色的发梢，还有你跃跃欲试的心。
t_en: A breeze blows by at just the right moment, stirring both her pink hair tips and your eager heart.

t_ch: 即将逝去的青春，最后的校园生活，近在眼前，所以你决定——
t_en: Your youth is slipping away, and your final days of campus life are right before your eyes, so you decide—

t_ch: 我要找…谁来着？
t_en: Who was I... looking for again?

t_ch: 我到底…要找谁来着？
t_en: Who exactly... was I supposed to find?

t_ch: 青春！校园！我来了！
t_en: Youth! School life! Here I come!

t_ch: 嗯！和我一起浪费青春吧！再不浪费就来不及啦！
t_en: Yeah! Waste your youth with me. If we don't waste it now, it'll be too late!

t_ch: 你看了看桌上的课程表。
t_en: You glance at the class schedule on the desk.

t_ch: 下一节课是…历史课？要去上吗？还是去别的教室看看？
t_en: Next class is... History? Should I go? Or check out another classroom instead?

t_ch: 瓦尔特老师，你还好吗？你可是我重点要关心的对象啊。
t_en: Mr. Yang, are you alright? You are one of the people I need to look after the most.

t_ch: 我只是回忆起自己曾在{RUBY_B#圣芙蕾雅}另一所学校{RUBY_E#}里担任过老师…那段时光简直像梦一样。
t_en: I was just recalling my time teaching at {RUBY_B#St. Freya}another school{RUBY_E#}... Those days felt like a dream.

t_ch: 那就是梦，你现在是这座学院的老师，要牢牢记住唷。
t_en: That was only a dream. You are a teacher at this academy now, and you must remember that.

t_ch: 对了，我想和你聊聊姬子同学的事……
t_en: Oh, that reminds me, I wanted to talk to you about the student named Himeko...

t_ch: 等等，有学生过来了，我们去办公室聊。
t_en: Hang on. Students are coming. Let's continue this in my office.

t_ch: 面具？咱们社的面具有好几十张吧？校长要找的面具到底啥样……
t_en: Masks? Our club has dozens, doesn't it? What kind of mask is the dean even looking for...

t_ch: 你管它呢，火花校长要的，我们统统要找出来献给她！
t_en: Who cares? If Dean Sparxie wants them, we will find every last one and present them to her!

t_ch: 火花？我怎么记得校长不叫这个名字啊？
t_en: Sparxie? But... I'm pretty sure the dean isn't called that.

t_ch: 我已经解释过很多遍了！是有人嫉妒我，嫉妒我对你太阳一般炽热的感情！
t_en: I have explained it to you so many times already! They're jealous of me! Jealous of my passion for you, blazing as bright as the sun!

t_ch: 所以{F#她}{M#他}故意设计陷害，让我变成了你们女生口中说的那个…「愤海狂徒」。
t_en: So {F#s}he set me up on purpose, making me into what you girls call... call... the "Maniac of the Swirling Waters"!

t_ch: 你一定要相信我，拉克什米！我是无辜的！
t_en: You have to believe me, Rakshmi! I'm innocent!

t_ch: （努力与环境融为一体）
t_en: (Trying hard to blend in with the surroundings)

t_ch: 你从未如此感谢自己的头发是灰色的。在钢筋混凝土的森林里，你拥有浑然天成的保护色。你，{NICKNAME}，生来便是潜行术的大师。
t_en: You've never been more grateful for your gray hair. In this concrete jungle, you've got natural camouflage. You, {NICKNAME}, were born to be a master of stealth.

t_ch: （哟哟，斯科特你很行吗？）
t_en: (Yo, Skott! You've got guts!)

t_ch: 你狂喜，你屏住呼吸，你的八卦之魂在胸中闷烧。你快活得像是一只发现垃圾桶近在咫尺的浣熊。
t_en: You're ecstatic, holding your breath, with your inner gossip-monger burning in your chest. You're as happy as a raccoon that's just spotted a trashcan within reach.

t_ch: （这根本不是拉克什米吧？）
t_en: (That's not even Rakshmi!)

t_ch: 这和尾巴大爷描述的那个暗恋斯科特的拉克什米根本不是一个人吧？还是她吃胖了？
t_en: This can't be the same Rakshmi Mr. Tail said was into Skott. Did she put on a few pounds or something?

t_ch: 等等，尾巴大爷…又是谁？
t_en: Wait... who's Mr. Tail... supposed to be?

t_ch: 在你朦胧的记忆里，曾有一团清冷、英俊、广受欢迎的仙舟岁阳和你们共处过一个美好的学年。那一年，你们形影不离。
t_en: In your hazy memories, there was once a cool, handsome, and widely popular Xianzhou heliobus who shared a wonderful academic year with you all. That year, you were inseparable.

t_ch: 哟吼，可惜它现在已经回仙舟「罗浮」上学啦。
t_en: Yoohoo~ Too bad they've gone back to study on the Xianzhou Luofu now.

t_ch: （可算给我赶上好时候了。告白，快点告白啊！）
t_en: (Finally, the perfect chance. Come on, hurry and confess!)

t_ch: 喔，拉克什米，别再折磨我了，你倒是说句话呀——
t_en: Oh, Rakshmi, stop tormenting me like this. Say something...

t_ch: 哼，斯科特同学。有没有一种可能，你口中那个对你「充满嫉妒」的灰毛人类，其实一直想要…占有你呢？毕竟，这种小心思，我们女孩子最懂了。
t_en: Hmph. Skott, did it ever occur to you that the gray-haired human you say is "so jealous" of you might actually... want to possess you? After all, we girls know these little schemes best.

t_ch: 是可忍，孰不可忍。
t_en: This is the last straw.

t_ch: 必须把谣言掐死在萌芽中。
t_en: These rumors must be nipped in the bud.

t_ch: 现在我要决斗的人有两个。
t_en: Now I have two opponents to duel.

t_ch: 你一脚踢翻身旁的桶子，从角落里走了出来。
t_en: You kick over the bucket beside you and walk out from the corner.

t_ch: 吓！又一个躲起来的家伙！
t_en: Ack! Someone else hiding in the shadows!?

t_ch: 拉克什米，为什么要说又？…还有你，{NICKNAME}！为什么！每一次！你都能精准无误地毁掉我人生的重要时刻？！
t_en: Rakshmi? Why did you say "Someone else"?... And you, {NICKNAME}! Every! Single! Time! Why do you have to completely ruin all the important moments of my life!?

t_ch: …是你邀请我来的啊？
t_en: ...But you're the one who invited me here.

t_ch: 斯科特同学，不是你邀请我来天台…决斗的吗？
t_en: Skott, weren't you the one who called me to the rooftop... for a duel?

t_ch: 哈？！斯科特同学，你是故意把这个灰毛人类叫来气我的吗！
t_en: Huh!? Skott, did you deliberately get this gray-haired human to come here just to spite me!?

t_ch: 意识到拉克什米出手时，一切都已晚了。斯科特结结实实挨了一耳光，铁的。
t_en: By the time anyone realized Rakshmi was making her move, it was too late. Skott took a solid slap to the face... and boy, did it sting.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我要…和你…<size=36>决斗</size>——！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I... I challenge you... to a <size=36>duel</size>!

t_ch: 究竟是「银河球棒侠」{NICKNAME}技高一筹，还是「愤海狂徒」斯科特难逢敌手？
t_en: Who's the real ace here: the "Galactic Baseballer" {NICKNAME}, or the "Maniac of the Swirling Waters" Skott?

t_ch: 热血男儿悲愤的咆哮响彻绘世学院的天台，而制霸学园顶点之人，只能有一位！
t_en: The anguished roar of a fiery young man reverberates across the rooftop of Graphia Academy. Only one can reign supreme from the pinnacle of the school!

t_ch: 好了，别打了！{F#大姐}{M#大哥}，算我求你了！
t_en: Alright, enough! Please, I'm begging you, {M#bro!}{F#ma'am!}

t_ch: 毁了…我的校园恋情…还有我一手组建的帮派，全都被你毁了！这下子你开心了吧？！
t_en: It's over... my campus romance... and the gang I built with my own hands. You ruined them all! Are you happy now!?

t_ch: 对不起，我真不知道…
t_en: I'm sorry. I really had no idea...

t_ch: 不都是你自找的吗？
t_en: Isn't this all your own fault?

t_ch: 斯科特，期待下一次决斗。
t_en: Skott, I look forward to our next duel.

t_ch: 闭嘴！我要去冷静冷静！你，不许再靠近我！
t_en: Quiet! I need to calm down! Y—You stay away from me!

t_ch: 又一位宿敌被你击败，学园中再无敌手。登临天台，你只觉人生寂寞如雪，不胜寒意。
t_en: Yet another rival has fallen by your hand, and now none remains on campus to challenge you. Standing atop the rooftop, you feel life's loneliness descend upon you, cold as snow.

t_ch: 斯科特好像掉落了什么？是装备吗？
t_en: Did Skott drop something? Is it equipment?

t_ch: 卡片上的男人神似斯科特…不对，这玩意就是斯科特。毕竟世上没有人的神情能像他这样欠揍。但卡片上的男人，穿的并不是绘世学院的校服。
t_en: The guy on the card looks just like Skott... no, scratch that. It IS Skott. After all, nobody else could have such a punchable face. But the man in the card isn't wearing the Graphia Academy uniform.

t_ch: 在你脑海里，有什么东西悄然碎裂。你想起来了，他穿着一身星际和平公司的制服。
t_en: Something quietly shatters in your mind. You remember now, he was wearing an Interastral Peace Corporation uniform.

t_ch: 本不该存在的记忆涌上了脑海。这个名叫斯科特的男人，并不是这里的学生…和你一样。
t_en: Memories that shouldn't exist flooded into my mind. This man called Skott isn't a student here... just like you.

t_ch: 必须快点联系三月七。
t_en: I have to contact March 7th right now.

t_ch: 你叫来了三月七，向她展示了卡片。
t_en: You called March 7th over and showed her the card.

t_ch: 这个斯科特…不对！{NICKNAME}，我想起来了！
t_en: That Skott... no, wait! {NICKNAME}, I remember now!

t_ch: 你想起什么来了？
t_en: What do you remember?

t_ch: 我们去校长室找到了杨叔，可是火花突然出现了！我们原本是来找一个叫啵啵娃的老师的！
t_en: We found Mr. Yang in the dean's office, but Sparxie suddenly popped out! We were actually here to find Ms. Dollie!

t_ch: 可是，我们来见啵啵娃老师，是要做什么的呢？
t_en: But why did we come to see Ms. Dollie in the first place?

t_ch: 是啊…我们到底来这儿做什么的呢？
t_en: Yeah... what exactly did we come here for?

t_ch: 还记得吗？火花一直让学生们在学校里翻箱倒柜。
t_en: Remember how Sparxie kept ordering students to rummage through every corner of the school?

t_ch: 同学们！今天是「校园卫生日」，请帮助火花校长找到「那件东西」~♥像是档案室之类的地方，都给我翻上一翻哟。
t_en: Students! Today is Campus Cleanup Day, so help dean Sparxie find "that thing"~♥ Search places like the archive room from top to bottom.

t_ch: 也许咱们可以去她说的「档案室」看看！
t_en: Maybe we should check out the "archive room" she mentioned!

t_ch: 档案室里，学生们正热火朝天地翻箱倒柜。
t_en: In the archive room, students were frantically rummaging through cabinets and drawers.

t_ch: 啊，是校长派你们来这儿的吗？真是的，只让我们在这儿辛苦，太不像话了！
t_en: Ah, did the dean send you here? Seriously. Leaving us here to do all the work is just too much!

t_ch: 老师让你们找什么？
t_en: What did the teacher ask you to look for?

t_ch: 怎么回事，上课不认真就算了，连老师的吩咐都不好好听？
t_en: What's going on? Not paying attention in class is bad enough, but you don't even listen to the teacher's instructions?

t_ch: 有没有见过一张带着微笑的面具？老师要我们找到它。
t_en: Have you seen a mask with a smile on it? The teacher told us to find it.

t_ch: 面…面具？我好像记起来了，我们就是为了找到面具来到这儿。
t_en: A... a mask? Now I remember. We came here to look for a mask.

t_ch: 巧了不是？我也为这个来的，还不快去干活？
t_en: What a coincidence! I'm here for the same thing. Get to work already!

t_ch: 我们被派去找啵啵娃老师了。
t_en: We were sent to find Ms. Dollie.

t_ch: 你知道啵啵娃老师是哪一位吗？
t_en: Do you know which teacher is Ms. Dollie?

t_ch: 该怎么形容呢…她是那种，非常特别的女性！你要是见过她，绝对忘不了她的样子！
t_en: How should I put this... She is such a unique woman. Super unique! Once you meet her, you will never forget what she looks like!

t_ch: 你说的这啵啵娃老师到底有多美啊？
t_en: Woah! How beautiful is this Ms. Dollie?

t_ch: 哈？啵啵娃老师和美完全搭不上边吧？要是你们手头有什么合影啊，教职工活动照片之类的，我倒是可以给你们指指看她在哪。我说你们，到底来不来帮我干活啊？
t_en: Huh? Beauty and Ms. Dollie have nothing to do with each other. If you have any group photos or faculty event pictures, I can point her out to you. But seriously, are you going to help me with this work or not?

t_ch: 三月，你之前是不是给我看过一张合影来着？
t_en: March, didn't you show me a group photo earlier?

t_ch: 我这儿有一张我们班的合影。可这上面只有两位老师啊。
t_en: I have a class photo right here, but it only shows two teachers.

t_ch: 什么嘛，这上面不是有三个老师吗？
t_en: Seriously? There are three teachers in this photo.

t_ch: 啵啵娃老师，不就在这吗？
t_en: Isn't Ms. Dollie right here?

t_ch: 等等，这是啵啵娃老师？
t_en: Wait. That's Ms. Dollie?

t_ch: 她是个魔偶，应该是整座学校教职年龄最大的老师了。什么呀，到头来你们从没上过她负责的幻造艺术课，对吧？
t_en: She's a charm doll, probably the teacher who's worked the longest out of the entire staff. Wait, don't tell me you've never taken her imagenesis class?

t_ch: 我、我终于想起来了…姬子姐嘱托我们必须找到啵啵娃老师，从她手中拿回面具。
t_en: I—I finally remember it... Himeko told us we must find Ms. Dollie and take the mask back from her.

t_ch: 可恶，完全被火花这个坏东西骗得团团转呀！
t_en: Darn it! That wretched Sparxie had us running in circles!

t_ch: 浪费了两年时间！
t_en: Two whole years wasted!

t_ch: 两年…？等等，这两年的时光也是假货！
t_en: Two years...? Wait, even those two years were fake!

t_ch: 可这念书时的辛苦感觉，也太逼真了吧！这么一想，火花更可恶了啊！
t_en: But all the pain of studying felt so real! That just makes Sparxie even more annoying!

t_ch: 记忆之力一点没帮上忙啊！
t_en: The power of the Remembrance was no help at all!

t_ch: 三月，你的「记忆」力量呢，怎么那么容易就被牵着鼻子走了？
t_en: March, what happened to your power of the Remembrance? How could you be led around so easily?

t_ch: 一定…一定是本姑娘太上进好学的缘故，才会这么容易堕入幻觉里。等等，{NICKNAME}，你不也没察觉吗？
t_en: It must be... it must be because I'm so passionate about learning! That's why I fell into the illusion so fast. Wait, {NICKNAME}... you didn't notice it either, did you?

t_ch: 「上了两年学」只是个错觉，咱们最多应该只是被困住了两小时。现在行动起来还不算太迟。
t_en: "Two years of studying" were nothing but an illusion. At most, we've only been trapped here for two hours. It's not too late to act now.

t_ch: 既然知道了啵啵娃老师的模样，那么，也该是本姑娘发挥大作用的时候了——
t_en: Now that we know what Ms. Dollie looks like, it is time for me to step up...

t_ch: 三月的认真形态！
t_en: March's serious mode, activate!

t_ch: 你打算怎么做？
t_en: What's the plan?

t_ch: 啵啵娃老师消失不见，不是被抓起来了，就是她自己主动躲着火花。接下来，我们把她找出来就好。
t_en: Ms. Dollie has vanished. Either she's been captured, or she's actively hiding from Sparxie. All we need to do is find her.

t_ch: 让火花瞧瞧，「记忆」真正的用法——就是有些费相机和胶卷。
t_en: I'll show Sparxie how the power of the Remembrance should really be used! It'll just cost us some film.

t_ch: 拍到她了！
t_en: I got a photo of her!

t_ch: 那个火花…根本不是校长吧？
t_en: That Sparxie... she's not really the dean at all, is she?

t_ch: 她有什么目的？
t_en: What are her intentions?

t_ch: 她在搜索我的下落，我必须躲起来…
t_en: She is searching for me. I must stay hidden...

t_ch: 封锁幻造教室…不能让她找到！
t_en: Seal off the imagenesis classroom... can't let her find me!

t_ch: 找到啦！快走，必须赶在火花之前从她手里得到面具。
t_en: Found it! Let's go! We have to get the mask before Sparxie does.

t_ch: 你…你是绘世学院的学生吗？我明明已经封锁了这间教室…你是怎么找到我的？
t_en: A—Are you a student from Graphia Academy? I've already sealed this classroom... How did you find me?

t_ch: 啵啵娃老师？别害怕。我受姬子委托前来。
t_en: Ms. Dollie? Don't be afraid. Himeko sent me.

t_ch: 你死心吧。她托付给我的东西，我绝对不会交给外人的。
t_en: Give up. I will never hand over what she entrusted to me to outsiders.

t_ch: 外面那个冒牌校长也在翻箱倒柜找它，对吧？
t_en: That impostor dean outside is rummaging for it too, right?

t_ch: 没错，那个叫火花的假面愚者设局劫持了这座学校…我真是花了好大的力气才找到了你。
t_en: That's right. The Masked Fool Sparxie pulled off a takeover of the academy... It took me so much work to find you.

t_ch: 我是星穹列车的无名客，眼下只有我才能保护你，请你一定要相信我！
t_en: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express, and right now I'm the only one who can protect you. Please, you must trust me!

t_ch: 星穹列车…确实，最近在报纸和电视上看到了列车来二相乐园的消息。
t_en: The Astral Express... indeed, I read about its arrival in Planarcadia in the papers and saw it on TV recently.

t_ch: 既然你宣称自己是姬子的朋友。那就回答几个关于她的问题——如果答案正确，我就将面具交给你。
t_en: Since you claim to be Himeko's friend, answer a few questions about her. If your answers are correct, I will entrust you with the mask.

t_ch: 我早有准备了，你问吧！
t_en: I'm ready for this. Fire away!

t_ch: 姬子最擅长泡的咖啡种类……
t_en: What kind of coffee is Himeko best at brewing...

t_ch: 等、等等！你怎么会问出这种奇怪的问题？你难道不知道她泡的咖啡根本不能入口吗？
t_en: W—Wait a second! How could you ask such a question? Don't you know her coffee is absolutely undrinkable?

t_ch: 啊哈哈哈，看得出来你深受其害了！那么第二个问题，姬子最讨厌什么样的人？
t_en: Ahahaha, looks like you've suffered from it yourself. Then here is the second question. What kind of people does Himeko hate the most?

t_ch: 喋喋不休、满嘴花言巧语的人。听说列车上有个无名客就是这么被她赶下车的。
t_en: A real chatterbox with a silver tongue. Word is, she even managed to kick a Nameless off the Express because of that.

t_ch: 哈哈，虽然她登上列车后的事情我不太清楚…不过这事确实有她上学时那副大姐大的派头。
t_en: Haha. I may not know much about her time on the Express... but that does sound just like the bossy vibe she had back in school.

t_ch: 好吧，我基本可以信任你了。那么，最后一个问题：姬子同学在这座学校里经历了她人生中最后悔的事，是哪件事？
t_en: Very well, I can almost trust you. The final question: Himeko experienced the greatest regret of her life during her time at this school. What was that?

t_ch: 这谁知道哇？该不会是为了追求时髦，给自己换了个帅气短发的…那件事？
t_en: Who knows? Could it be about... that time she got a stylish short haircut to keep up with the trends?

t_ch: 她、她竟然连这段往事也告诉你了吗，看来你们确实是朋友！但，不是这个答案。
t_en: S—She actually told you that story? It seems you really are her friend. But that's not the answer.

t_ch: …唉？我竟然被那家伙骗了吗？
t_en: ...Huh? Did I really get played by that guy?

t_ch: 倒也不是你答错了。也许姬子同学从没向你谈起过，仔细想想，她确实无法向别人提起这样的事情……
t_en: It isn't that you were wrong. Perhaps Himeko never told you. Now that I think about it, she might never bring herself to share such a burden...

t_ch: 唉，姬子同学最后悔的，应该是十五年前…不，还是不提那场旧事了。
t_en: The thing she regretted most... must be what happened fifteen years ago. No. Better not bring that up.

t_ch: 我相信你，你确实是姬子的朋友。那么……
t_en: I believe you. You truly are Himeko's friend. Then...

t_ch: 什么！我竟然被这么可笑的小花招骗了啊！
t_en: What!? I actually let myself be fooled by such a cheap trick?

t_ch: 我说你们俩，来的实在太迟啦！
t_en: You two came much too late!

t_ch: 对、对不起，啵啵娃老师！可恶，还是被火花抢先一步了！但她是怎么知道那么多关于姬子姐的事情——
t_en: S—Sorry, Ms. Dollie! Darn it, Sparxie got ahead of us again! But how could she know so much about Himeko...

t_ch: 那个{RUBY_B#瓦尔特}眼镜男{RUBY_E#}，对于「自己成为了老师」这件事似乎并没有什么抵触心啊！我只要变成你们的样子和他聊聊，许多事情就了如指掌了，不是吗？
t_en: That {RUBY_B#Welt}man with glasses{RUBY_E#} seems to have no issues with "becoming a teacher." Once I took your forms and chatted with him, I got everything I wanted to know.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，同伴间的彼此信任有时候可是有害的啊。
t_en: Hahaha! Sometimes trust among companions can be quite dangerous.

t_ch: 可恶，竟然敢骗杨叔！
t_en: Now you've done it! How dare you trick Mr. Yang!

t_ch: 你竟敢变成我的样子！
t_en: How dare you turn into me!

t_ch: 作为网络主播，换个皮套，就像换个外套那样简单。反正大部分人也只在意外表，我说的对吧，无名客？
t_en: Swapping avatars is as easy as slipping on a shirt for a streamer. Most people only care about appearances anyways. Isn't that right, Nameless?

t_ch: 火花，把面具交出来！
t_en: Sparxie! Give up the mask!

t_ch: 你可惹毛我小三月了！{NICKNAME}，反正她逃不掉，干脆一不做二不休，夺下她手里的面具！
t_en: You have really made me angry! She can't run away anyway, {NICKNAME}, so why don't we take the mask from her by force!

t_ch: 哟吼~恭喜你，发现了盲点~
t_en: Woo-hoo~ Congratulations! You figured out my weakness~

t_ch: 不过，在「幻月游戏」进行期间，被佩戴的欢愉假面就像被剪过的电影票根，只属于最先使用它的人…看来，这点小小常识，你们是完全不懂喔？
t_en: But the Mask of Elation that has been worn is like a clipped movie ticket. It only belongs to the one who used it first during the Phantasmoon Games... Seems you're completely unaware of such simple common sense. How sad~

t_ch: 什么？！
t_en: What!?

t_ch: 星穹列车，出局！有资格加入「游戏」的，只有最可爱的火花花！
t_en: Astral Express, out! The only one worthy of joining the games is the adorable Sparxicle!

t_ch: 接下来，该犒劳犒劳我的粉丝们了…你们两位，会留下来观赏我精心为大家准备的「火花大会」的，对吧~♥
t_en: Now then, it is time to treat my fans... You two will stay and witness my "SparxiCon" that I've carefully prepared, right~♥?

t_ch: 火花大会？
t_en: SparxiCon?

t_ch: 这将会是一场震撼整个二相乐园的、史无前例的大表演，由火花花为大家献上，全网直播！
t_en: This will be a spectacle that shakes all of Planarcadia to its core, a grand performance unlike any before! It's brought to you by Sparxicle and live-streamed across the entire web!

t_ch: 你们不用知道节目单啦。因为我会洗掉你们心底最后一点反抗和敌意，让你们变成我的死忠粉~
t_en: You don't need to know the program list, because I will erase the last residues of resistance and hostility in your hearts and turn you into my loyal fans~

t_ch: 别做梦了！
t_en: Stop dreaming!

t_ch: 呀，好顽强喔！不愧是{RUBY_B#花火}旧型号{RUBY_E#}所中意的玩具。
t_en: Oh my, how defiant! No wonder you are the toy favored by my {RUBY_B#Sparkle}old model{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 没关系，我会洗掉你们心底最后一点反抗和敌意，变成我的死忠粉~
t_en: It's okay. I will erase the last residues of resistance and hostility in your hearts and turn you into my loyal fans~

t_ch: 粉丝们~该准备起来啦，先把这两位闹事的黑粉给抬走吧！我有更重要的工作要做。
t_en: My dear fans, time to prepare! Carry off these two noisy haters for now. I have more important work to attend to.

t_ch: 不必担心，我来帮{F#她}{M#他}一把。
t_en: Do not worry. I will lend {M#him}{F#her} a hand.

t_ch: 黑暗仿佛一幅画布盖住了你，再揭开时，你已不在原地……
t_en: Darkness drapes over you like a canvas, and when it lifts, you find yourself somewhere else...

t_ch: 这里是…档案室吗？
t_en: Is this... the archive room?

t_ch: 传送带来的晕眩和列车跃迁的失重感如此相似，更让你天旋地转的是，你发现三月七并不在身边。
t_en: The dizziness from teleportation feels just like the weightlessness during Express warping, but what really makes your head spin is discovering that March 7th isn't by your side.

t_ch: 看来无论出手相助的人是谁，他只能勉强把你一个人送到安全地带。
t_en: Looks like whoever tried to help could only barely manage to get you alone to safety.

t_ch: 喂喂，我最可爱的粉丝们，找到面具和啵啵娃老师的目标已经圆满达成。
t_en: Hey there, my sweetest fans, the mission of finding the mask and Ms. Dollie has been a complete success.

t_ch: 可就在刚刚，有一位头发灰灰，心眼黑黑的黑粉潜入了学校，想要对火花花做出可怕的事情~！我好怕！大家…不会坐视可爱的火花花被坏人伤害吧？
t_en: But just moments ago, a gray-haired, black-hearted hater slipped into the academy, plotting something dreadful against Sparxicle! I am so scared! You... You won't stand by and let the adorable Sparxicle be hurt, right?

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}会躲在学校哪里呢？拜托啦，让我们一起把这个坏家伙揪出来好不好呀？
t_en: Where could {F#s}he be hiding in the school? Please? Let's root out this villain together!

t_ch: 各位，让我们一起把那家伙揪出来！
t_en: Everyone, let us drag that intruder out!
Yeah!!!

t_ch: 那家伙躲不了多久的。
t_en: They will not be able to hide for long.

t_ch: 用膝盖想也知道，眼下凭你一个人看来是无法打倒火花和她的狂热粉丝了。
t_en: It doesn't take a rocket scientist to figure out that you can't defeat Sparxie and her rabid fans all by yourself right now.

t_ch: （向姬子报告）
t_en: (Report to Himeko)

t_ch: （四下搜索出口）
t_en: (Search for the exits)

t_ch: 门外，急促、嘈杂的脚步声渐渐涌来。
t_en: Outside the door, hurried and chaotic footsteps gradually approached.

t_ch: 开门啊！你躲起来也没用！我们待会儿就会把你抓出来！
t_en: Open the door! Hiding won't save you! We will drag you out soon enough!

t_ch: 想也知道，蓄谋已久的火花绝对不会留下任何一丝让你逃走的机会。
t_en: As expected, Sparxie's been plotting this for a while. She won't leave you even the slightest chance of escape.

t_ch: 门外，急促、嘈杂的脚步声渐渐涌来。
t_en: Outside the door, hurried and chaotic footsteps gradually approached.

t_ch: 你躲在里面也没用！待会儿就会把你抓出来！
t_en: Hiding won't save you! We will drag you out soon enough!

t_ch: 穷途末路了吗？
t_en: Have you reached the end of your rope?

t_ch: 外面都是火花的狂热粉丝…眼下还是不要出去为好。
t_en: Sparxie's crazed fans are everywhere outside... It is best not to step out for now.

t_ch: 快看！那个灰毛的黑粉在这儿，为了火花花，抓住{F#她}{M#他}！
t_en: Look! There is the gray-haired hater. Grab {M#him!}{F#her!} For the sake of Sparxicle!

t_ch: 你一头钻进了档案室，把门反锁起来。
t_en: You rushed into the archives room and locked the door behind you.

t_ch: 一幅招贴画，突兀地出现在档案室的黑板上。你发誓自己上一次来这儿的时候，没见过这东西。
t_en: A poster, jarringly out of place, has appeared on the archive room's blackboard. You swear you hadn't seen it the last time you were here.

t_ch: （细看招贴画）
t_en: (Look closely at the poster)

t_ch: 飘飘双耳如扶风弱柳，半阖双眸似秋波欲眠的……
t_en: With ears that sway like the feeble willows in a gentle breeze, and half-lidded eyes like autumn waters ready to slumber...

t_ch: …一只粉毛狐狸？
t_en: ...a pink-furred fox?

t_ch: （这个粉毛…我曾在哪里见过的？）
t_en: (This pink-haired person... where have I seen this person before?)

t_ch: 椒丘…？
t_en: Jiaoqiu...?

t_ch: 对吗？不对不对！…对吗？
t_en: Is that right? No, no, that can't be... right...?

t_ch: 班级合照里那个…？
t_en: The one in the class photo...?

t_ch: 想起来了！是班级的合照里那个狐狸女孩？
t_en: I remember now! She's the fox girl in the class photo!

t_ch: 你居然还能记得。看来，这确实就像是漫画里常说的那什么…「命运般的邂逅」。你遇到了一点点麻烦，而我将将好出现在这儿。
t_en: So you actually managed to remember. Seems like this is what they call in comics... a "fateful encounter." You stumble into a bit of trouble, and I will happen to show up here.

t_ch: 喂，靠近点好嘛？
t_en: Hey, come a little closer, will you?

t_ch: 这又是什么地方……？
t_en: What is this place...?

t_ch: 几小时前，有两位无名客也踏进了这里，问出了同样的问题。我就用那些人的答案来回应你的提问好了——
t_en: Two Nameless came through here a few hours ago and asked the exact same question. I will use their answers to reply to you...

t_ch: 「这儿是画中世界的某处，被称之为幻月秘庭的地点。按照古籍记载，此地是『幻月游戏』的仪式中枢。」
t_en: "This is a place in the World in Canvas, known as the Phantasmoon Courtyard. According to ancient texts, this is the heart of the 'Phantasmoon Games' ceremony."

t_ch: 对了，其中一位无名客正在学校里「假扮」老师呢…哦，我是不是剧透了？这样不好。
t_en: Oh, and one of those Nameless is "playing" the part of a teacher at the school... Oh dear, was that a spoiler? That's not good.

t_ch: 你好啊，主角。
t_en: Greetings, protagonist.

t_ch: 原来我是主角！
t_en: So I really am the protagonist!

t_ch: 主角？难怪！你总觉得人生充满了不可思议的奇遇。人人对你另眼相看，回回总能死里逃生。你有种说不清道不明的朦胧感受，你对这个宇宙很重要。
t_en: The protagonist? No wonder! You always feel like your life is full of incredible adventures. Everyone treats you differently, and you somehow manage to escape death every single time. You have this vague, indescribable feeling that you're important to this universe.

t_ch: 而这个女孩仅用两个字就精准概括了你，「主角」。毫无疑问，她是个天才！
t_en: And this girl summed you up perfectly with just one word: "protagonist". No doubt about it, she's a genius!

t_ch: 你好啊，狐狸小姐。
t_en: Greetings, Miss Fox.

t_ch: 主角？这个称呼有点自恋吧？
t_en: Protagonist? That sounds a bit self-aggrandizing.

t_ch: 你第一次听到有人用这么夸张的说法称呼你。她有什么目的？你不禁怀疑。
t_en: It's the first time someone's called you something so over the top. What's her angle? You can't help but feel suspicious.

t_ch: 你年轻、{F#美丽}{M#英俊}、才华横溢，但最重要的是，你还拥有为人谦逊低调的高贵品质。你打算大声告诉这个女孩，你不是什么主角，你是——
t_en: You're young, {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}, and incredibly talented, but most importantly, you possess the noble quality of being humble and low-key. You're about to tell this girl loudly that you're not some protagonist, you're—

t_ch: 就叫我无名客吧。
t_en: Just call me the Nameless.

t_ch: 虽然严格来说，每个人都是自己人生的主角。但你不一样…你是《苍天航路绒绒号》的主角，对吧？
t_en: Technically, everyone is the protagonist of their own story. But you are different... You are the protagonist of the Fluffy Across the Blue, aren't you?

t_ch: 银河…球棒浣熊？唔？你长得也不像浣熊啊。
t_en: Galactic... baseballer raccoon? Hm? You do not really look like a raccoon.

t_ch: 忘了自我介绍，我叫绯英。请多关照。
t_en: Ah, I forgot to introduce myself. You can call me Evanescia. Great seeing you!

t_ch: 围绕神木下的一池静谧之水，八座神坛遥遥相对，仿佛暗合某种古老的阵仪。
t_en: Around the tranquil pond beneath the sacred tree, eight altars stand facing one another, seemingly arranged in an ancient ceremonial formation.

t_ch: 空底座下镌刻一行几乎不可辨认的文字：「焚烧众愿，调伏诸恶」。
t_en: Beneath the empty pedestal, there's a barely legible inscription: "Incinerate all Wishes, subdue every evil."

t_ch: 这不是…火花的面具吗？
t_en: Wait... isn't this Sparxie's mask?

t_ch: 这棵神木…好美啊。
t_en: This sacred tree... it's beautiful.

t_ch: 水中有月亮的倒影…可是这儿也照不见月亮啊？
t_en: There's a reflection of the moon in the water... but you can't even see the moon from here.

t_ch: 第一位佩戴面具的谒者出现了，很快，「幻月游戏」就要开始了。
t_en: The first Supplicant wearing a mask has appeared. The Phantasmoon Games will soon begin.

t_ch: 你到底是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 别害怕，把我当成观众就好，就像是读者看漫画那样的关系。
t_en: Do not be afraid. Just think of me as part of the audience, like a reader following a comic.

t_ch: 你怎么知道的？
t_en: How do you know that?

t_ch: 一点小小的经验。就像一个人看了许多漫画后，自然而然就会对超能力战斗和校园恋爱无师自通。
t_en: A bit of experience. Just like someone who has read enough comics can get superpowered battles and schoolyard romances without any instructions.

t_ch: 你刚才说那个…苍什么号？
t_en: What did you just say... Fluffy something?

t_ch: 你不会没看过吧？最近在这个世界大火的漫画？
t_en: Do you seriously mean you've never read it? The comic that has taken this world by storm?

t_ch: 以星穹列车的冒险故事为原型，讲述可爱的小动物们搭乘火车在银河里旅行的…《苍天航路绒绒号》？
t_en: It is inspired by the adventures of the Astral Express, telling the tale of cute little animals riding a train across the cosmos... Fluffy Across the Blue?

t_ch: 有人画了星穹列车的漫画？
t_en: They actually made a comic about the Astral Express?

t_ch: 是啊，这里可是「二相乐园」，什么故事都可能被改编成漫画的。
t_en: Of course. This is Planarcadia. Any story can be turned into a comic here.

t_ch: 怎么没人通知我们？
t_en: Why were we never told?

t_ch: 我也没提供授权啊？
t_en: I never gave my consent.

t_ch: 可恶，得狠狠敲作者一笔。
t_en: Darn it, we ought to wring a hefty sum from that author.

t_ch: …你这个人好怪啊。明明上一刻还被人追得四处逃窜，一眨眼又能若无其事地谈起这种不着四六的事情。这是眼下该关心的事吗？
t_en: ...You are such a curious one. You were fleeing for your life a moment ago, yet now you can talk so casually about such nonsense. Is that really what matters right now?

t_ch: 不过，这份松弛感，很好玩。
t_en: Still, that sense of ease... it is entertaining.

t_ch: 看在你能取悦我片刻的份上，我来给你一点小小的帮助。说罢，想要什么样的？
t_en: Since you managed to amuse me for a moment, I will grant you a little aid. So, what would you like?

t_ch: 帮我做掉火花！
t_en: Help me take down Sparxie!

t_ch: 你这是买凶杀人？不好吧。
t_en: You are hiring a killer? That will not do.

t_ch: 这个故事可是很健康的。
t_en: This story is meant to stay wholesome.

t_ch: 帮我离开这座学校。
t_en: Help me leave this school.

t_ch: 你想离开这儿？比赛还没开始，你已经失了先手哦。近在咫尺的参赛资格，还有朋友统统落入了敌人手里。
t_en: You want to escape? The match has not even begun, and you have already lost your initiative. The enemy had both taken your qualification to join and your friends.

t_ch: 就这么狼狈地离开，好吗？
t_en: Is to leave in such disgrace truly what you want?

t_ch: 你能帮上什么忙啊？
t_en: What could you possibly do to help?

t_ch: 我不习惯别人用问题来回答我的问题。想想清楚再开口呀。
t_en: I don't like it when someone answers my question with another question. Think before you speak.

t_ch: 看眼神，你似乎很不甘心呢，浣熊{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: I can see it in your eyes, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Raccoon. You will not accept defeat.

t_ch: 我有朋友被困在这儿！
t_en: My friends are trapped here!

t_ch: 我要打败火花！
t_en: I will defeat Sparxie!

t_ch: 我必须加入幻月游戏！
t_en: I must join the Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 这份斗志，很有趣。在古老时代的「幻月游戏」里，总会有不知死活的谒者戴上面具，向幻月展现他们的疯狂、奇想与幽默感——
t_en: That resolve is interesting. There will always be foolhardy Supplicants donning the mask in these ancient Phantasmoon Games, laying before the Phantasmoon their madness, fancies, and humor...

t_ch: 用计斩杀天外降到地表的魔物，偷取神明的笑声铸成足以拦腰斩断大山的名刀，或者去到画中世界的深处骗回逝者之魂灵……
t_en: They would weave schemes to slay monsters descending upon this planet from beyond the sky, steal the laughter of the gods to forge blades that could split mountains, or descend into depths of the World in Canvas, to swindle the souls of the departed...

t_ch: 像这样有趣的人，已经很久很久没有出现了。也许你有机会成为其中之一？毕竟，你是「主角」嘛。
t_en: Such entertaining individuals have not appeared for ages. Perhaps you have a chance to become one of them? After all, you are the "protagonist."

t_ch: 我可以借你一点点力量。不过，需要对等的代价——这样才不算违背规则。
t_en: I can lend you a little power, but an equal price is required. Otherwise, it would violate the rules.

t_ch: 你必须在一个昼夜间击败追逼你至此的敌人。如若不然，你的灵魂将属于她，作她永世的奴仆。这个条件，你接受吗？
t_en: You must defeat the enemy who pursued you here within the next day and night. If you fail, your soul will be enslaved by her for all eternity. Do you accept?

t_ch: 我接受！
t_en: I accept!

t_ch: 不接受也不行吧！
t_en: As if I had a choice!

t_ch: 那么，约定成立。
t_en: Then it is done.

t_ch: 天上幻月，地上神木，于此时见证此誓，如天之恒，如月之升，永无破弃。
t_en: Phantasmoon above and sacred tree below, witness this oath at this moment. As constant as the vault of heaven, as certain as the moon's rise, let it be never forsworn.

t_ch: 来吧，让我把你变得…更像{RUBY_B#「浣熊」}「主角」{RUBY_E#}一点。
t_en: Now come. Let me make you... more of a "{RUBY_B#raccoon}protagonist{RUBY_E#}."

t_ch: 小灰毛，你还好吗？
t_en: Gray Hair... Are you all right?

t_ch: 火花劫持了一座学校！
t_en: Sparxie has taken over a school!

t_ch: 我怎么一点也不意外呢？听起来就像是我做梦时会做，她醒来就会做的事情。
t_en: Can't say I am surprised. It sounds exactly like something I would dream of, and something she would carry out the moment she awoke.

t_ch: 不过，比起以前「幻月游戏」里发生的某些事情，情况还不算太糟。
t_en: Still, it ain't too bad compared to the horrors that unfolded in previous Phantasmoon Games.

t_ch: 至少你还有几个朋友帮得上忙，对吧？
t_en: At least you still have friends willing to stand by you, right?

t_ch: 火花到底和你什么关系？
t_en: What exactly is your actual connection to Sparxie?

t_ch: 呃…我在这儿偶尔也会给自己找点活儿，网络主播是其中之一。「火花」就是我在网络上直播时所用的ID，我一笔一笔画出了她。
t_en: Uh... Now and then I do odd jobs here... livestreaming is one of them. Sparxie is the name I used to stream online. An avatar that I personally sketched line by line.

t_ch: 为了让自己不在的时候，直播工作也能照常进行，我给了这个虚拟形象一丁点力量。
t_en: To keep the streams running even when I was absent, I breathed a trace of power into that avatar.

t_ch: 但谁能想到，从幻月满月后，一切就都变得不对劲了。
t_en: Who would've figured that everything changed after the Phantasmoon turned full...

t_ch: 她活过来了？
t_en: She came to life?

t_ch: 她不再只是个虚拟形象？
t_en: She's no more than just a virtual avatar?

t_ch: 你和火花是一个人吧！
t_en: You and Sparxie are one and the same!

t_ch: 这家伙不过是个渴望从网络上吸引所有人关注的庸俗画皮罢了。你可别拿她和我相提并论。
t_en: She's nothing more than a basic skin that's desperate for online attention! Don't compare her with me.

t_ch: 人们向她倾诉心愿和渴望，到头来，这家伙也被这些心思给裹挟了。
t_en: People offloaded their wishes and desires to her, and in the end, she too got consumed by these emotions.

t_ch: 唉，创作出的形象一旦被大家的关注赋予了自己的想法，就连我这个作者也奈何不了她了。
t_en: Once a creation gains a will of its own from the attention of the masses, even its creator can no longer restrain it.

t_ch: 你怎么会在这儿？
t_en: Why are you here?

t_ch: 我一直在关注你们，本想着什么时候能出手帮帮你。不过很可惜，你们不是和公司的人混一块，就是和「异常防御部」的人走一起。
t_en: I've been watching you from the start, waiting for the right moment to step in and help. Sadly, you were either with the IPC's people or with the Department of Aberration Defense.

t_ch: 结果，你和三月宝宝一路走进了那所冒着不祥气息的学校，那一刻，我就知道事情不在我的掌控中了。
t_en: Then you and darling March wandered right into that school of bad omens. That was when I realized things had slipped out of my hands.

t_ch: 所以，说说呗，那所学校里发生了什么？
t_en: So, tell me, what happened in that school?

t_ch: 你简单讲了讲绘世学院里的情况。
t_en: You briefly explained the situation at Graphia Academy.

t_ch: 你想告诉她，这短短几小时就像一个荒诞的梦，但手边那张奇怪的纸糊面具却证明一切真实不虚。
t_en: You want to tell her that these few hours felt like some absurd dream, but the strange paper mask beside you proves that everything was real.

t_ch: （这是能够加入幻月游戏的欢愉假面吗？）
t_en: (Is this the mask of Elation that grants entry into the Phantasmoon Games?)

t_ch: 接下来该怎么办？
t_en: What should we do next?

t_ch: 还能怎么办？快联系你那些列车上的伙伴吧。当然咯，文明社会，你也可以试着把电话打给治安局嘛。
t_en: What do you think? Call your companions on the Express ASAP. Or, since this is a civilized society, you could try phoning the Security Bureau.

t_ch: 不过，这些事情显然已经超出了他们能力的范围啦。听说在过去，谒者们的行动根本无人能管。哎呀，那可真是个自由自在的好时代啊。
t_en: But these matters are obviously far beyond what they can do. They say that no one could restrain the Supplicants' actions in the past. Aww, those were the good ol' days of freedom.

t_ch: 连治安官也不管？
t_en: Not even the security officers would intervene?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，小灰毛，你未免也太天真了吧。你去过那么多的世界，面对天崩地裂、末日降临的危机时，官方又能怎么办啊？不要为难人家啦。
t_en: Hahaha, Gray Hair, you are so naive! You've been to countless worlds. When the skies collapse and the end draws near, what can the authorities possibly do? Don't make their jobs too hard.

t_ch: 「幻月游戏」可是欢愉之主定下的仪式，每一场游戏结束，这世界总会诞生翻天覆地的奇迹：新生的幻造种，不可思议的异象，充满希望的未来。
t_en: The Phantasmoon Games are nothing less than a ceremony set down by the Master of Elation. Amazing miracles always appear in the world after every game ends, like the birth of new imagenae, unthinkable phenomena, or a future brimming with hope.

t_ch: 你听过这样的问题吧：「如果有机会让世界科技进步一百年，却要牺牲一只小猫咪，你愿意吗？」
t_en: Perhaps you have heard the question: "If the world's science and technology could leap forward by a hundred years at the cost of a single kitten's life, would you kill the kitten?"

t_ch: 我愿意。
t_en: I would.

t_ch: 哇哦，很冷酷嘛。恭喜你，你和这个世界选择了一样的回答。
t_en: Wow, how ruthless. Then you chose the same answer as this world did.

t_ch: 我不愿意。
t_en: I won't.

t_ch: 哼哼…二相乐园显然选择了「愿意」。
t_en: Heh... But clearly, Planarcadia would.

t_ch: 但现在它威胁到的是人啊？
t_en: But it's human lives that are now at risk!

t_ch: 自然灾害、交通事故、突发恶疾…这个世界每天光是这些死亡原因的人数就够凑出一座小城的人口了。「幻月游戏」不过是在地图上抹去一座学校，听起来是不是好多了？
t_en: Natural disasters, traffic accidents, sudden illnesses... the number of deaths from such causes in this world could fill a small city every day. The Phantasmoon Games are just erasing one school from the map. Isn't that much better?

t_ch: 我想你一定会问，在兑换未来的仪式上，生命的价值真的可以如此计算吗？
t_en: You probably want to ask whether the worth of human lives can truly be calculated in that way in this ceremony, where we surrender that cost to purchase the future.

t_ch: 没人知道答案。
t_en: No one knows.

t_ch: 好啦，现在不是讨论伦理问题的时候吧？小灰毛，你到底打不打算救你的三月宝宝和杨叔啊？
t_en: Whatever. This is not the time to debate over ethics. Gray Hair, are you gonna save darling March and Mr. Yang or not?

t_ch: 时候不早了，真珠小姐，列车这边另有事需要处理……
t_en: The hour grows late, Miss Pearl. Matters regarding the Express demand our attention...

t_ch: 无论是同盟，还是「幻月游戏」，如果您有更进一步合作的意愿，我随时敞开大门。
t_en: Be it the alliance or the Phantasmoon Games, if you seek deeper cooperation, my doors remain open.

t_ch: 那么，告辞了。
t_en: Then, I shall take my leave.

t_ch: 人类的社交模型，真是复杂。我的推演依旧未能覆盖星穹列车全部的策略树。
t_en: How intricate human social interaction models are. My extrapolation still cannot account for the full strategy tree of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 大人，玉阙仙舟的爻光将军前来拜访。需要让她等候吗？
t_en: Master, General Yao Guang of the Xianzhou Yuque is here to see you. Shall we have her wait?

t_ch: 不，仙舟也将成为重要盟友。必须有足够的接触与模仿，才能理解他们的行动策略。
t_en: No. The Xianzhou will also become a key ally. Only through enough contact and emulation can we hope to comprehend their methods and strategies.

t_ch: 结论：今天剩下的时间，应该无法临摹作画了。请爻光将军进来吧。
t_en: Conclusion: I don't think I'll be able to keep copying the painting for the rest of today. Let General Yao Guang in.

t_ch: 鄙人是遍智格物院荣誉院长、十方光映法界之主、仙舟非物质文化遗产雀形拳传人、戎韬将军——爻光。
t_en: I am the honorary dean of the Omniscience Sapientia Academe, master of the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, bearer of the Xianzhou's intangible cultural heritage "the sparrow-shaped fist," and the Seer Strategist— General Yao Guang.

t_ch: 感谢您的拨冗接见，真珠女士。
t_en: Thank you for seeing me despite your busy schedule, Madam Pearl.

t_ch: 差一点误判为语言处理进程出错：以为您将整个使团的人带进了房间。
t_en: For a moment, I nearly mistook your words as a fault in language processing: I believed you had brought the entire delegation inside.

t_ch: 银河中有幽默感的智械可不多。我听说您和{RUBY_B#螺丝咕姆}那位天才{RUBY_E#}一样，是由螺丝星的星体差分机所造就的诸多奇迹之一。果然闻名不如见面。
t_en: Few Intellitrons in the cosmos have a sense of humor. I have heard that, like {RUBY_B#Screwllum}that genius{RUBY_E#}, you are one of the many wonders wrought by the Celestial Differentiator of Planet Screwllum. Meeting you in person far outshines your reputation.

t_ch: 我观真珠女士「机」人天相，内涵冰清，外彰玉润，忍不住给您算了一卦。卦象涨落于离、乾之间，是大有之相，爻动于六五。
t_en: Madam Pearl, seeing how you have a "calculating" look, and with your heart pristine and your outer form so dazzling, I could not help but cast a divination for you. The hexagram lies between Fire and Heaven, demonstrating a bountiful harvest with your fortunes lying at the zenith or even beyond.

t_ch: 我未曾学习占卦，还请将军为我解读一二。
t_en: I have no training in divination. General, may I ask you to interpret it?

t_ch: 啊，换成智械也能听懂的语言，我以仙舟的预测算法推演您的运势，得卦为<unbreak>101111</unbreak>，是个大吉大利的征兆——若以诚信待人，将大有收获。
t_en: Ah, then let me speak in terms even an Intellitron can follow. I extrapolated your fortune using the Xianzhou's predictive algorithms. The result is <unbreak>101111</unbreak>, a sign of great blessing. If you treat others with sincerity, abundance will follow.

t_ch: 帝弓天将的传奇，我闻名已久：景元将军的智谋、飞霄将军的骁勇、怀炎将军的工巧……
t_en: I have long heard of the Arbiter Generals' legends: the strategy of General Jing Yuan, the courage of General Feixiao, the ingenuity of General Huaiyan...

t_ch: 我偶尔猜想：那些不常现身人前的仙舟将军会是怎样的人物？
t_en: Often, I have wondered: what kind of figures are the Xianzhou generals who remain away from the public eye?

t_ch: 今日与爻光将军相逢，不免觉得：以您的美丽，应该时常抛头露面。
t_en: Meeting General Yao Guang today, I cannot help but think that: with such beauty, you should step into the light more often.

t_ch: 看来您学习了不少仙舟的语料——甚至晓得如何「激将」。
t_en: Looks like you've studied the words of the Xianzhou well. You've even learned the art of "provocation."

t_ch: 前面几位被您夸赞各擅胜场，到了我这儿，怎么偏偏只剩下一句「美丽」？
t_en: You praised the others for their individual and unique talents, yet when it comes to me, the only thing you had to say was "beauty"?

t_ch: 将军万勿多心。在我看来：美丽之物最为珍贵，维持其存在也最为不易。
t_en: Do not misunderstand me, general. To me, beauty is the rarest of treasures and the most fragile to preserve.

t_ch: 何况，关于您的情报实在太少，如何恭维是一道难解之题。
t_en: Besides, intel on you is truly scarce. It is quite difficult for me to find ways to compliment you.

t_ch: 不过，我知道：「玉阙」是众仙舟之智囊，玉阙的将军是卜者之尊。仅以决断局势而论——「是否加入反毁灭同盟」一事，没人比您更适合投出仙舟联盟的一票。
t_en: But what I do know is: The Yuque is the think tank of the Xianzhou ships, and its general is the master of all diviners. Speaking purely of deciding the course of affairs, no one is better suited than you to cast the Xianzhou Alliance's vote on whether to join the Anti-Destruction Alliance.

t_ch: 那么，对于这一议题，您意下如何？
t_en: So, general, what is your decision in this?

t_ch: 这议题如此宏大，我又怎能轻言决断？不过，我想先送一条重要的情报给你，以作互通有无的见面礼……
t_en: This topic is far too great for me to decide on a whim. But as a gift and to complement the respective gaps in our knowledge, allow me first to offer you a piece of vital intelligence...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>也借此有请公司，亮明口头空谈以外的诚意。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And with it, I ask the IPC to show sincerity beyond empty words.</color>

t_ch: 我不太明白您的逻辑：「毁灭」的威胁临近，合作似乎无需更多的理由。
t_en: I do not follow your logic: with the threat of the Destruction looming, what need is there for further reasons to cooperate?

t_ch: 树立一位大敌为目标，说服过去的对手成为盟友，再借机蚕食——公司的丰功伟绩里，这类例子不算少。
t_en: Set a mighty foe as a common goal, convince former enemies to turn allies, then devour them in turn... Such feats are hardly rare in the IPC's annals of glory.

t_ch: 我理解：仙舟质疑公司的诚意。
t_en: I understand. The Xianzhou questions the IPC's sincerity.

t_ch: 不如说我们想请公司展示诚意——礼尚往来，我先送上的这条情报非同小可，耽误不得。
t_en: It would be better to say we ask the IPC to demonstrate its sincerity. Courtesy demands reciprocity, and the intel I now offer you is both urgent and weighty.

t_ch: 提问：眼下还有什么事情比结成「反毁灭同盟」更重要？
t_en: Question: what could be more important at this moment than forming the Anti-Destruction Alliance?

t_ch: 纳努克不会在这几天里毁掉整个宇宙，但有个家伙倒有可能在这几天里毁掉这「二相乐园」。
t_en: Nanook won't erase the universe in the next few days, but someone else might destroy Planarcadia within that time.

t_ch: 您听说过「星核猎手」的成员，刃，对吧？
t_en: You have heard of Blade, the Stellaron Hunter, right?

t_ch: 公司一直重金悬赏，但我未曾见过。
t_en: The IPC has long placed a great bounty on his head, though I have never laid eyes on him.

t_ch: 就在最近，玉阙截获了一条情报。这个男人以所谓「仙舟第一杀手」的名义接下了当地帮派「共愿帮」的雇佣。
t_en: The Yuque recently intercepted a report. Styling himself as "Xianzhou's Number One Assassin," this man accepted a contract from the Synwish Syndicate, a local organized violence group.

t_ch: 他来这儿要做什么，我不得而知。但此人是仙舟重犯，十恶大逆，本领高强，等闲难有敌手。我作为玉阙将军，会一手担负起将之捉拿归案的义务，以免他在此生出事端。
t_en: I do not know his exact aim here, but he is a major criminal of the Xianzhou. He is guilty of the Ten Unpardonable Sins and is a formidable fighter, with few able to match him. As General of the Yuque, I will take it upon myself to bring him in before he can cause disaster here.

t_ch: 哈托彼亚这颗星球也是泛银河贸易体系的一员，刃是公司通缉的重犯。既然他踏入这里，就在当地的法治管辖中。
t_en: This planet, Ahatopia, is part of the Pan-Cosmic Trade System, and Blade is a wanted criminal of the IPC. Since he has set foot here, he falls under its law.
